title: UniformLoadSetRecord
description: UniformLoadSetRecord: Definition of a single uniform load in the gravity direction (-Z), to be added to a UniformLoadSet.

Name.description: Description of the source of this load, such as: 'Partitions', 'Occupancy', or 'MEP & Ceiling'

Loadcase.description: The Loadcase in which to apply this load. Loadcase: Basic load case class. All load classes need to point to one Loadcase.

Load.description: The magnitude of this load, generally to be applied as an AreaUniformLoad in the gravity direction (-Z) Property has a quantity of type Pressure measured in [Pa].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
